name: All RFCs
sql: SELECT a.key, a.id, a.description, a.issuetype_id, a.issuetype_name, a.parent_id, a.parent_key, a.summary, a.priority_id, a.priority_name, a.assignee_accountid, a.assignee_displayname, a.assignee_active, a.reporter_accountid, a.reporter_displayname, a.reporter_active, a.status_id, a.status_statuscategory_id, a.resolution_name, substr(a.resolved, 1, 10) as resolved, substr(a.updated, 1, 19) as updated, a.components, a.customfield_11599_id, a.customfield_11599_value AS "With QA observations", substr(a.customfield_11203, 1, 19) as "Change completion date", a.customfield_10400_id, a.customfield_10400_value as "Reporter Area", a.customfield_11446_id, a.customfield_11446_value as "Compliance", a.customfield_11655_id, a.customfield_11655_value, substr(a.customfield_10700, 1, 10) as "Execution time", a.customfield_10807_id, a.customfield_10807_value as "Final State", a.customfield_10806_id, a.customfield_10806_value as "Change Resolution", a.customfield_10809, a.customfield_11602_id, a.customfield_11602_value as "Fields with QA observations", a.customfield_11680 as "Delay Time", a.customfield_11460_value, a.customfield_11138_value, a.customfield_11136_value, a.customfield_11405_value, a.customfield_11373_value as "Product or Application", a.customfield_11465_accountid, a.customfield_11465_displayname, a.customfield_11465_active, a.customfield_10800_value, a.status_dl, a.loaded_date, b.name as general_status, c.name as category_name FROM prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_rfcs a INNER JOIN prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_status b ON (a.status_id = b.id) INNER JOIN prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_issuetypes c ON (a.issuetype_id = c.id) WHERE a.status_dl = 'true'

CalculatedField.Category: ifelse(contains({category_name}, 'Emergency'), 'Unplanned Rate', ifelse({Final State} = 'Successful', 'Successful Rate', ifelse(Compliance= 'Compliant', 'Compliance Rate',  ifelse(contains({category_name}, 'Standard change'),'Standard Rate', ifelse(dateDiff({Change completion date}, resolved, 'DD') > 7, 'Changes Closed On Time', concat('****',{category_name}))))))
CalculatedField.Delay Time Value: ifelse({Delay Time}<=3, 'On Time (<=3)', ifelse({Delay Time}>3 AND {Delay Time} <= 7, 'Delay [4,7]', ifelse({Delay Time}>7 AND {Delay Time} <=21, 'Delay [8,21]', ifelse({Delay Time}>21, 'Delay > 21', '?'))))
CalculatedField.tt: {AV Program}+{Booking Engine}+{Coalition & Global Partners}+{Financial accounting}+{Financial Report Process}+{Financial Operations - Billings}+{Financial Management}+Integration+{LifeMiles Mobile App}+{Lifemiles.com}+{Mail Service}+{Member Direct}+{Partner Portal}+PayFlow+{Payment System}+{Sign-in}+{Upgrades System}
